name: Chicken Macaroni Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 Cans Cream of Mushroom Soup, undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl and refrigerate overnight.
3. Pour the mixture into a shallow 13 x 8 1/2-inch casserole dish.
4. Bake for 1 1/4 hours.
